glossary.subject: DCN Capacity upgrade required for {{mappings.orderType}} with order no: {{mappings.orderNumber}} for site {{mappings.siteId}}.
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

For {{mappings.orderType}} order with order number {{mappings.orderNumber}} DCN team has determined that DCN is full and the DCN capacity at site {{mappings.siteId}} has to be upgraded.

Order no: {{mappings.orderNumber}}
Site id: {{mappings.siteId}}
Device Name: {{mappings.deviceName}}

Please check the {{ mappings.url }} with the order number {{mappings.orderNumber}} for more information.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
